# Support

For product, setup, and operational questions:

- Website: https://thlcorporation.com
- Contact: `admin@thlcorporation.com`

## What to Include

- OS and distro version.
- Install command used.
- Relevant logs and error output.
- Whether the issue happens with domain mode or IP:port mode.

For security issues, do not open a public issue. Follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
